titleStmt.title: SII 10.241: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu

No. 241. (A.R. No. 273 of 1905.) ON A SLAB LYING ON THE ROOF OF A SMALL MAṆḌAPA IN FRONT OF THE RĀMADĒVA SHRINE IN THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀNTAKĒŚVARA, TRIPURANTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 1107. (Viśvāvasu)

summary.p: States that Kākatīya Rudradēva I made a gift of the village of Rēvūru on the banks of the Kṛishṇavēṇī river, in the Koṇḍapalli-nāḍu to god Tripurāntakēśvara of Śrīparvata.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastapraśastivibhava sakalasaṁprabhava samarasamasama
ṇaghōṣasamā¨rṇnanavisa¨rppat bāṣpadhārādhauta pratibhaṭabhaṭīgaṁḍa calama¨rttu
tasakalanarapatimaṇimakuṭakōṭimakarikācuṁbyamānacaraṇanakhakiraṇakaṁ
mūrurāyajagadaḷa karakaḷitakaravāḷakṣapitavipakṣavilāsinīviḷaṁbyamānālakavallarīvinissārita lalāṭataṭaka
stūrikātilaka kākatikulatilaka Anumakoṁḍapuravarādhīśvara paramamāhēśvara śrīsvayaṁ bhūdēva
śrīpādapadmārādhaka parabalasādhaka nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara kākati
yyarudradēvamahārājulu svasti śrīśakavaruṣaṁbulu 1107 Agunēṁṭi viśvāvanusaṁvatsara puṣya
śūgu . nāṁṭi makarasaṁkrāṁttipuṇyakālamuna śrīpa¨rvataśirōmaṇi śrīmatkumāragiri tripu
rāṁttakadēvara Aṁgaraṁgabhōgālaku koṁḍapallināṁṭilōni kṛṣṇavēṇīnadītīramaṁdu
paḍumaṭa rēvūrunu catussīmamunu sakalāyasahitamugānu dhārāpū¨rvaka
drā¨rkkasthāyigā nicciri . kaṭṭedanapalliki polamera Aṣṭasīmamuluṁnu . tū¨rpunanu pera
gnēyānanu vāsudēvanipaḍaṁtamu . dakṣiṇamunanu Ekkuḍugaṭṭumṛcukuṟuvānu
¨rpuḷaḍiyānu . nairutyānanu cīkaṭivāṁgu Ippaguṭṭānu prāpeḍlateruvu leḍajuvi
nu . paḍumaṭa ṟēlaladonacikirēnūnu miḍlaceṟuvu kāluderuvu cittaguṭṭānu . pāṁḍu pādi
dona Ekkuva kalaviguṭṭānu . vāyavyāna doṁḍapāṭa nuṁḍi vaccina vāṁgu lēṭilōpali ru
cipūṁḍiteruvu peddaciṁtānu . Uttarāna kilakaṁṭitervu baḍavāṭi[te?]ruvu būṭapāṭa teru
ḍipiguṭṭānu . Akkaḍanuṁḍi vaccina bhaṁḍiteruvu nodda koccapallagaṭṭānu Ippala doramōnu
vāngū . rēvūriki Aṣṭaśīmamu . tū¨rpuna doṁḍapāṭiteruvu Ipparāvini . Eddanapallimiṁdi
rakamarēvaṭiciṁttamānūnu . Āgnēyamuna kāmireḍikuṁṭa karēvaṭi ka vāṁgūnu .
Inukavāṁgūnu . nairutyānaṁ ṭṭapāṭisaṁdulāripaṟēru
buḍinikaṁṭipiṁḍarēruvupa ṭṭunallavanu
yuttarānanu kūcipūṁḍiteruvupuṭa lakuṁṭa
na sūrebōnivāṁgūnu . Īśānyamunaṁ jiṁta
nu . sāmānyōyaṁ &c
usual imprecatory verses
Digital edition of SII 10.241 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
